name: the write-time flag selection lives only in the shared primitive and is not duplicated in either caller
command: grep -q -- '--single-file-gate' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" && grep -q -- '--include-app-code' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" && ! grep -q -- '--single-file-gate' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" && ! grep -q -- '--single-file-gate' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" && echo flags-only-in-primitive 1>&2
